subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Ancient One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, that He may cause him to soar in His atmosphere and be drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله القدیم لمن آمن بالله العلیم الحکیم لیجعله طائرا فی هوائه و منجذبا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Word of God and human limitations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
